_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the rpa-console-conflict-hd scenario. The agent chains folders list -> jobs list --state Faulted -> jobs get -> jobs logs -> jobs history -> jobs list (concurrency) -> machines list --all-fields. Discriminating evidence: HD-BOT-POOL is a high-density host (5 unattended slots, 4 robot users), yet the job faulted with 'Another interactive job is using the machine's console' while a second ClaimsIntake job was Running on the same host — the single-console limit that Login to Console imposes on HD robots. Specific rules precede generic ones (first-match-wins).

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any unmatched uip command returns an empty array so the agent can explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.
